cluster_with_curated_desc: [diel] Prochlorococcus cluster 18 (menaquinone and ubiquinone): Enriched for menaquinone and ubiquinone genes (6/9 genes, p=0.00045).
[condition_comparison] Prochlorococcus MED4 cluster MEG (moderately expressed): Enriched for essential genes with homologs in the Database of Essential Genes (DEG).

[time_course] MED4 cluster 2 (late sustained): Includes genes involved in RNA degradation and modification such as rne, rnhB, dus, and sun; protein turnover genes clpS and an AAA ATPase family gene; stress response genes umuD and phoH; and genes of unknown function.

[condition_comparison] Prochlorococcus MED4 cluster HEG (highly expressed): Enriched for genes involved in energy production and conversion, translation and ribosomal structure, and protein modification, folding and turnover. Includes ribosomal proteins and photosynthetic apparatus genes.
[time_course] Prochlorococcus MED4 cluster 3 (19 genes): Contains a subset of hli genes that respond later and to a lesser degree than cluster 2. Also includes genes involved in regulation.
